patient_summary: 73-year-old female (per multiple source documents) with documented mixed dyslipidemia and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Key problems documented 06/30/2023 include Mixed dyslipidemia (Primary), Essential hypertension, Postoperative anemia, Leg pain, and Unspecified anemia. Notable recent labs from 07/03/2023 at SINGING RIVER GULFPORT HOSPITAL LAB: Triglycerides 158 (H), VLDL 32 (H), LDL Calculated 62, HDL 54, Ferritin 266.8 (H), Iron 41 (L), Iron Saturation 15 (L), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L). Procedures: COLONOSCOPY WITH BIOPSY performed/scheduled 02/21/2025 at Piedmont Newnan Hospital by Haroon, Mustafa, MD. Functional assessments document difficulty with walking/stairs and some activities of daily living across 2021–2023 assessments. Multiple care teams listed, including PCP Hoyet A Hand, MD and several Piedmont providers. Conflicts present in source data for DOB and legal sex and for tobacco history; these are preserved for review.
